name: TDD-STATE-MACHINE-BACKLOG-7
title: Housekeeping wave 1: remove dead scripts tdd-drift-check.py + tdd-context.py + re-anchor stale Inv numbers + tidy auto_close_backlog stub
description:
Bundled housekeeping items for tdd-state-machine, surfaced by wave-1 review.

HIGH (originally H1, H2):
(H1) DELETE tdd-drift-check.py. grep shows zero runtime callers. Referenced only in feature.json/contract.md prose and build-contract.json deploy target. Decision: per Bounded Scope + Designed Deprecation, delete the script + remove its deploy target + retire associated spec invariants. The 'drift sweep' purpose stated in spec Inv 5 was never wired up; deletion is cleaner than speculative re-wiring.

(H2) DELETE tdd-context.py. Same pattern — zero runtime callers. Spec Inv 4 says 'consumed by subagent prompts' but dispatch-tdd-subagent.py does not import or reference it. Delete + remove deploy target + retire spec invariants.

MEDIUM (M14):
Re-anchor stale Inv numbers in tdd-context.py (line 28+57 reference 'Inv 23' and 'BUG-53'; line 106 references 'Inv 28') and test/test-context.py (line 139 cites 'Inv 25 post-BACKLOG-12 renumber') and test_helpers.py (refs 'Inv 25'). Current spec only has Inv 1-12. Since H1/H2 will delete tdd-context.py + test-context.py, this issue self-resolves for those files. test_helpers.py — re-anchor or delete the stale comment.

LOW:
(F4) auto_close_backlog at tdd-step.py:160-171 is a documented no-op stub still in the _post_test_green_hooks chain (lines 292-295). Inv 7 codifies it as 'retained as a no-op stub' — pure ceremony, dispatcher closes linked items. Delete the function + its call + remove from Inv 7 bullet.
(F5) Test gap: no e2e test exercises 'transition <feat> spec-update' from test-green state. Inv 1/4/10 sanction this _FORWARD_ALT transition. Add small test.

Acceptance:
- tdd-drift-check.py + tdd-context.py + test-context.py + test-drift-check.py (if exists) deleted from disk
- build-contract.json deploy targets for those scripts removed
- contract.md provides.scripts list updated to drop them
- spec invariants referencing the deleted scripts retired
- feature.json summary updated to remove the script names if listed
- auto_close_backlog stub deleted, Inv 7 bullet updated
- _FORWARD_ALT test added
- test_helpers.py stale Inv reference fixed
- All existing tests still pass

NOTE: this cycle is independent — no inter-feature dependencies.
